queries.question: Empirical analysis of the impact of loan duration in months on credit risk mitigation and default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Determinants of default: empirical analysis of how the absence of a checking account contributes to elevated credit risk exposure.

queries.feature_definition: Present employment duration: less than 1 year.
queries.question: Credit risk drivers: empirical analysis of how a present employment duration of less than one year increases the likelihood of loan default.
